answer: \boxed{Goriot is poor because he bankrupted himself to support his two well-married daughters, Delphine and Anastasie, financially and emotionally, despite their disrespect and lack of gratitude. His daughters, now wealthy through their husbands, abandon him when he is ill and refuse to visit him on his deathbed. His selfless devotion to them leaves him destitute and alone, highlighting the cruel indifference of high society.}
